§6Ferrouranium§f

§aA carbon steel-uranium alloy — hard, durable, and radiation resistant!§f

§bFerrouranium§f is a carbon steel-uranium (U-238) alloy known for its high hardness and durability, with radiation resistance due to its uranium content.

§6Production§f (§bCrucible§f):
§b• 1×§f Uranium-238 Nugget
§b• 2×§f Steel Nuggets
§b→ §e3×§f Ferrouranium Nuggets

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Ferrouranium Anvil§f — durable high-tier anvil
§b• Ferrouranium Drill Bit§f — tough mining tool
§b• Ducrete§f — reinforced construction material
§b• Weapons§f — high-durability weapon components

§eTip§f: The 3:1 output ratio makes ferrouranium efficient to produce. Stockpile nuggets for anvil and drill bit crafting — the anvil is essential for late-game assembly!
